title: Abacus AI Just Dropped AI SuperComputer With Claude And Gemini
summary: Abacus AI launched AI SuperComputer, an always-on cloud environment where AI agents can build, deploy, and run software with access to databases, storage, terminal, SSH, GitHub, AWS, and HTTPS deployment. It bridges the gap between code generation and live software deployment by providing agents a unified workspace with infrastructure capabilities.
